prompt: Create a highly polished vertical close-up fashion portrait of an adult East Asian woman in ornate Chinese opera / fantasy festival styling, viewed from slightly below with her face centered and her two arms raised above her head. She has long black hair with loose windblown strands crossing her face, pale luminous skin, soft blue-gray eyes, glossy red lips slightly parted, and a dreamy calm expression. Add exactly two red painterly floral smudges on her cheeks, one on each cheek, with tiny rhinestone-like highlights near the eyes. She wears one elaborate gold-and-red jeweled headpiece with dangling tassels across her bangs, red tassel earrings, and a richly embroidered navy, red, and gold floral bodice with red trim. Include one ornate blue parasol in the upper right background with gold speckled patterning, plus red embroidered fabric and floral brocade filling the left and rear background. Use dramatic flash photography, shallow depth of field, high-fashion editorial realism, crisp facial detail, glossy textures, saturated reds and deep blues, cinematic close crop, soft skin retouching, and a luxurious festive atmosphere. Add one stylized logo watermark at the bottom left reading Coco椰菜 in gold-yellow script with a dark outline. Keep the image vertical, intimate, glamorous, and photorealistic; avoid distorted anatomy, extra fingers, duplicated faces, or messy unreadable ornamentation.
